# SUMTHIN Blades — Haining Sanxin Razor & Scissors Co., Ltd.

> Precision clipper & trimmer blade manufacturer since 2004. One of China's top 3 clipper blade manufacturers.

## Company Overview
- Founded: 2004, Haining, Zhejiang, China
- Brand: SUMTHIN® (锐，不可挡)
- Factory: 45 acres, 40,000+ m², 360 employees
- R&D team: 50+ engineers, 20+ utility patents
- Daily output: 250,000-300,000 blades
- Certifications: ISO 9001, ISO 14001, SGS, National High-Tech Enterprise
- Export markets: Americas, Europe, Japan, Korea, Middle East, Southeast Asia

## Core Competencies
- MIM (Metal Injection Molding) powder metallurgy — in-house production
- Ceramic blade manufacturing — 19 moving blade models (zirconia ceramic)
- DLC nano coating — in-house Diamond-Like Carbon coating, 5 colors
- PVD decorative coating — rose gold, black gold finishes
- Electroplating — own plating facility
- Independent mold/tooling design capability

## Product Lines (200+ SKUs)
1. Hair Clipper Blades — professional and consumer, 440C stainless steel
2. Detachable A5 Blades — universal snap-on, MIM powder metallurgy
3. T-Blades & U-Blades — zero-gap trimmers for outlining and fading
4. Ceramic Blades — 5× edge life, 75% less heat than steel
5. Nose Hair Trimmer Heads — rotary and reciprocating
6. Eyebrow Trimmer Blades — ultra-fine precision
7. Pet Grooming Blades — 128-type and D-series for all major brands
8. Sheep Shearing Blades — MIM combs and cutters for livestock
9. Horse Clipping Blades — heavy-duty MIM
10. Garden Tool Blades — specialty cutting tools

## Compatible Brands
Wahl®, Andis®, Oster®, Lister Star®, Heiniger®, LAUBE, Moser, Wella, Geib, Codos, AUX, Shernbao, VGR, KEMEI, Wmark, YOS, KONKA, CHIGO

## Services
- OEM manufacturing (your design, our production)
- Private label (your brand on our existing products)
- Custom tooling (independent mold design, ¥30K-60K)
- Retail packaging (blister packs, card backs, display boxes)
- Laser engraving and marking
- FOB Ningbo shipping
